name: mouse_immunoglobulin_loci
description: Mouse immunoglobulin loci. IgH (Igh) is on chromosome 12 distal (~3 Mb spanning V_H, D_H, J_H, and C_H gene segments — Cmu, Cdelta, Cgamma3, Cgamma1, Cgamma2b, Cgamma2c (C57BL/6) or Cgamma2a (BALB/c), Cepsilon, Calpha). IgK (Igk) is on chromosome 6 (~3 Mb V_K + J_K + C_K). IgL (Igl) is on chromosome 16 (much smaller, only a few V_lambda segments — mice are heavily kappa-biased, ~95% kappa light chains). Within each locus, V-gene segments share 75-95% identity, generating mapping ambiguity that requires PSV disambiguation.
